ReleaseNotes:
Add firmware region detection and UI

Introduce firmware region detection and UI plumbing.

- Add Core.Models.FirmwareRegion and enum to represent detected regions and metadata (entropy, subregions, extra info).
- Implement Core.Services.FirmwareRegionDetector: memory-mapped file support, Intel Flash Descriptor parsing, UEFI FV scanning, embedded FS/compression signatures, mtdparts parsing, entropy calculation and helpers.
- Add ViewModels.FirmwareRegionViewModel and Views (FirmwareRegionView, FirmwareRegionWindow) to analyze files, export JSON and copy region lists.
- Integrate detection into UefiStructureViewModel (LoadFirmwareRegions, conversion to UEFI nodes, capsule vs regions UI state) and MainViewModel (run detection after chip reads and when loading binaries; show/hide structure panel accordingly).
- Add two UI converters (BoolToColorConverter, CapsuleModeToBorderColorConverter) and register them in App.axaml; update XAML to display region/encryption styling and adjust MainWindow layout/toolbar sizing.
- Bump EEFlasher.csproj version 1.0.20 -> 1.0.21.
- Small cleanups: remove exception message logging in CH341Interop and Spi25Protocol catch blocks to avoid leaking details.

Files added: Converters/*, Core/Models/FirmwareRegion.cs, Core/Services/FirmwareRegionDetector.cs, ViewModels/FirmwareRegionViewModel.cs, Views/FirmwareRegionView.* and FirmwareRegionWindow.*, plus related XAML/UI updates and minor code modifications to integrate detection.
